title: Conjecture 2
context_text: Theorem 1 establishes the chain $\overline{\operatorname{td}}(H)-1=\chi_{\_{\Delta}}(\mathcal{G}_{\_{H}})\leqslant\chi_{\_{\Delta}}(\mathcal{G}_{\_{H}}^{\text{odd}})\leqslant\chi_{\_{\star}}(\mathcal{G}_{\_{H}}^{\text{odd}})\leqslant 3\cdot 2^{\overline{\operatorname{td}}(H)}-4$. Conjecture 2 posits that both the defective and clustered chromatic numbers of $H$-odd-minor-free graphs equal the lower bound $\overline{\operatorname{td}}(H)-1$, closing the exponential gap left by the main theorem.
